pr.title: Refactor: Unify Auth Architecture and Remove Unused AI Components
pr.body:
#### Summary
This PR unifies the authentication architecture, refactors remaining Cubits to BLoC to match the project's state management patterns, and removes unused AI-related components as part of the Phase 1 refactoring plan.

- **Auth Architecture:** Consolidated auth user storage.
- **State Management:** Refactored attendance and servant Cubits to BLoC.
- **Cleanup:** Removed unused AI services and features, updated dependencies, and cleaned up related tests.
- **New Features:** Added new team data sources.

#### Test plan
- [ ] Verified dart fix and dart format across the project.
- [ ] Verified static analysis passes on the codebase.
- [ ] Validated Servant and Attendance BLoC refactoring with unit tests.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: Kerollosmm
